name: /setwelcome shows current settings and asks for new input

payload.text:
Current welcome message:

Welcome to the group! Please verify you're human by tapping the button below.

Current rules:
Be respectful. No spam. Follow the group rules.

Send the new welcome message, or tap Cancel.
